scripts.dev: concurrently -n api,web -c blue,green "pnpm --filter api dev" "pnpm --filter web dev"
scripts.dev:all: concurrently -n api,web,admin -c blue,green,magenta "pnpm --filter api dev" "pnpm --filter web dev" "pnpm --filter admin dev"
scripts.start: concurrently -n api,web,admin -c blue,green,magenta "pnpm --filter api dev" "pnpm --filter web dev" "pnpm --filter admin dev"
